subcodes.first_line: The missive from your honored self was received, imparting newfound joy and adorning the horizon of love with a wondrous radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض میشود نامه آنجناب رسید فرح جدید بخشید و افق محبت را بروشنائی بدیع مزین
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
